entity.name: SaleConfig

one-to-one.name: company
one-to-one.title: Company
one-to-one.help: Company for which the configurations are made.

decimal.name: acceptedCredit
decimal.title: Accepted Credit
decimal.help: Allows defining a maximum accepted credit amount by default for all customers. If a customer exceeds this amount, a salesperson will not be able to confirm a new order. An administrator can manually unblock the customer. This credit amount is found on customer forms (Accounting information tab). It can be modified on a case-by-case basis for each customer.

string.name: saleOrderClientBox
string.title: Client box in sale order
string.help: This field allows you to customize a customer box with information of your choice on quotation/order printings using an HTML field.

string.name: saleOrderLegalNote
string.title: Legal note on sale order
string.help: You can add your legal notices in this field, which will appear on quotation and order printings.

boolean.name: displaySalemanOnPrinting
boolean.title: Display saleman on printing
boolean.help: On quotation/order printing, displays the salesperson name.

boolean.name: displayDelCondOnPrinting
boolean.title: Display delivery condition on printing
boolean.help: On a quotation/order, in the Delivery information tab, there is a Delivery conditions text field. If this option is enabled, the content of this field will appear on the printing.

boolean.name: displayProductCodeOnPrinting
boolean.title: Display product code on printing
boolean.help: On quotation/order printing, displays the product code.

boolean.name: displayTaxDetailOnPrinting
boolean.title: Display tax detail on printing
boolean.help: On quotation/order printing, displays the tax details (name, rate, and amount).

boolean.name: displayEstimShipDateOnPrinting
boolean.title: Display estimated shipping dates on printing
boolean.help: On quotation/order printing, displays the estimated shipping dates, adding an extra column.

boolean.name: displayCustomerCodeOnPrinting
boolean.title: Display customer code on printing
boolean.help: On quotation/order printing, displays the customer code.

boolean.name: displayProductPictureOnPrinting
boolean.title: Display product picture on printing
boolean.help: On quotation/order printing, displays the product picture. This is the image visible on the product form.

many-to-one.name: defaultValidityDuration
many-to-one.title: Validity duration per default
many-to-one.help: This is the default validity duration for quotations that will be automatically filled in when creating a quotation.

boolean.name: isAnalyticDistributionRequired
boolean.title: Analytic distribution required on sale order line
boolean.help: If this option is enabled, it is mandatory that on each order line (Analytics tab), the Analytic distribution template field is filled in.

decimal.name: defaultHoldBackPercentage
decimal.title: Default holdback percentage
decimal.help: Allows defining the default holdback percentage applied by the company. This default rate can be modified at the payment conditions level or on a case-by-case basis on invoices.

many-to-one.name: saleOrderPrintTemplate
many-to-one.title: Sale order template
many-to-one.help: You can define here the default printing template for the company quotations/orders.

integer.name: cartOrderCreationModeSelect
integer.title: Order creation for cart when stock is missing
integer.help: This configuration allows choosing whether, in case of missing stock for products in the cart, you want to create the order with the missing products, block order creation, or ignore the missing products.

field.name: saleOrderInAtiSelect
field.help: It is possible to choose whether quotations/orders are always established excluding tax, always including tax, by default excluding tax, or by default including tax. The by default excluding tax and by default including tax options allow case-by-case modification (via a checkbox).
